name: Imu
effect_text: Under the rules of this game, you cannot include Events with a cost of 2 or more in your deck and at the start of the game, play up to 1 [Mary Geoise] type Stage card from your deck.[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 of your [Celestial Dragons] type Characters or 1 card from your hand: Draw 1 card.
